allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install langgraph langchain-core langchain-anthropic langchain-openai langchain-google-genai)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from hireshire.webapp.app import app; print\('app imported OK'\); print\([r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r,'path'\)]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:',list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('enable_tuner:',d['values'].get\('enable_tuner'\)\); print\('types has enable_tuner:', 'enable_tuner' in d.get\('types',{}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "print\('tuner enable_tuner:', 'enable_tuner' in open\('config/tuner.yaml'\).read\(\)\); print\('applier enable_applier:', 'enable_applier' in open\('config/applier.yaml'\).read\(\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8977/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"What does the funnel threshold setting mean? Keep it to one sentence."}' --max-time 60)
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8978/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"In one sentence, what does the funnel threshold setting mean?"}' --max-time 90)
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8979/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"Show me the top 5 matching jobs from today."}' --max-time 90)
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8979/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"Show the top 3 matches from the latest run."}' --max-time 90)
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8980/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"say hi in 2 words"}' --max-time 30)
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8980/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"say hello in exactly two words"}' --max-time 30)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'run_web.py' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $\($_.ProcessId\): $\($_.CommandLine\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8990/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"say hello in exactly two words"}' --max-time 30)
